ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age_recode" TEXT /* Age recode with <1 year olds */,
  "race_origin" TEXT /* Race and origin recode (NHW, NHB, NHAIAN, NHAPI, Hispanic) - no total */,
  "median_household_income" TEXT /* Median household income inflation adjusted to 2018 */,
  "rural_urban_code" TEXT /* Rural-Urban Continuum Code */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Insurance type */,
  "insurance_coverage" TEXT /* Insurance coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_sites" (
  "cancer_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer site */,
  "cancer_site_labeled" TEXT /* Primary Site - labeled */,
  "cancer_site_code" INTEGER /* Primary Site code */,
  "cancer_site_category" TEXT /* Cancer site category */,
  "cancer_site_subcategory" TEXT /* Cancer site subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "histologic_types" (
  "histologic_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each histologic type */,
  "histologic_type_code" INTEGER /* Histologic Type ICD-O-3 */,
  "histologic_type_name" TEXT /* Histologic type name */,
  "histologic_type_malignant" TEXT /* ICD-O-3 Hist/behav, malignant */,
  "histologic_type_category" TEXT /* Histologic type category */,
  "histologic_type_subcategory" TEXT /* Histologic type subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("histologic_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Grade name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "histology_recode" (
  "histology_recode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each histology recode */,
  "histology_recode_name" TEXT /* Histology recode - broad groupings */,
  "histology_recode_category" TEXT /* Histology recode category */,
  "histology_recode_subcategory" TEXT /* Histology recode subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("histology_recode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "summary_stage" (
  "summary_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary stage */,
  "summary_stage_name" TEXT /* Summary stage 2000 (1998+) */,
  "seer_combined_summary_stage" TEXT /* SEER Combined Summary Stage 2000 (2004+) */,
  "summary_stage_category" TEXT /* Summary stage category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "survival_months" INTEGER /* Survival months */,
  "vital_status" TEXT /* Vital status (Alive, Dead) */,
  "survival_status" TEXT /* Survival status */,
  "date_of_last_follow_up" TEXT /* Date of last follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metastases" (
  "metastasis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metastasis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "bone_metastasis" TEXT /* SEER Combined Mets at DX-bone (2010+) */,
  "brain_metastasis" TEXT /* SEER Combined Mets at DX-brain (2010+) */,
  "liver_metastasis" TEXT /* SEER Combined Mets at DX-liver (2010+) */,
  "lung_metastasis" TEXT /* SEER Combined Mets at DX-lung (2010+) */,
  "distant_lymph_node_metastasis" TEXT /* Mets at DX-Distant LN (2016+) */,
  "other_metastasis" TEXT /* Mets at DX-Other (2016+) */,
  "number_of_metastasis_sites" INTEGER /* Number of metastasis sites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metastasis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metastases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breast_cancer_subtypes" (
  "breast_cancer_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breast cancer subtype record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "breast_subtype" TEXT /* Breast Subtype (2010+) */,
  "er_status" TEXT /* ER Status Recode Breast Cancer (1990+) */,
  "pr_status" TEXT /* PR Status Recode Breast Cancer (1990+) */,
  "her2_status" TEXT /* Derived HER2 Recode (2010+) */,
  "breast_cancer_subtype_category" TEXT /* Breast cancer subtype category */,
  "breast_cancer_subtype_subcategory" TEXT /* Breast cancer subtype subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breast_cancer_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breast_cancer_subtypes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_stage" (
  "clinical_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical stage record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "cs_extension" INTEGER /* CS extension (2004-2015) */,
  "cs_lymph_nodes" INTEGER /* CS lymph nodes (2004-2015) */,
  "cs_mets_at_dx" INTEGER /* CS mets at dx (2004-2015) */,
  "cs_tumor_size_ext_eval" INTEGER /* CS Tumor Size/Ext Eval (2004-2015) */,
  "cs_reg_node_eval" INTEGER /* CS Reg Node Eval (2004-2015) */,
  "cs_mets_eval" INTEGER /* CS Mets Eval (2004-2015) */,
  "clinical_stage_category" TEXT /* Clinical stage category */,
  "clinical_stage_subcategory" TEXT /* Clinical stage subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinical_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_stage_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_specific_factors" (
  "site_specific_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site-specific factor record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "ss_factor_1" INTEGER /* CS site-specific factor 1 (2004+ varying by schema) */,
  "ss_factor_2" INTEGER /* CS site-specific factor 2 (2004+ varying by schema) */,
  "ss_factor_3" INTEGER /* CS site-specific factor 3 (2004+ varying by schema) */,
  "ss_factor_4" INTEGER /* CS site-specific factor 4 (2004+ varying by schema) */,
  "ss_factor_5" INTEGER /* CS site-specific factor 5 (2004+ varying by schema) */,
  "ss_factor_6" INTEGER /* CS site-specific factor 6 (2004+ varying by schema) */,
  "ss_factor_7" INTEGER /* CS site-specific factor 7 (2004+ varying by schema) */,
  "ss_factor_15" INTEGER /* CS site-specific factor 15 (2004+ varying by schema) */,
  "site_specific_factor_category" TEXT /* Site-specific factor category */,
  "site_specific_factor_subcategory" TEXT /* Site-specific factor subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_specific_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_specific_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cs_versions" (
  "cs_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical stage version record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "cs_version_input_current" INTEGER /* CS version input current (2004-2015) */,
  "cs_version_input_original" INTEGER /* CS version input original (2004-2015) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cs_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cs_versions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User affiliation */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* User access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of access attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
